component.name: Button
component.description: High-emphasis CTAs: **Semantic/Activity/Note** fill + self-tinted `0px 1px 2px` shadow (`SAVE TO JOB` / `SAVE CHANGES`), **`brandPrimaryXl`** **Brand/Primary** fill with note-colored shadow + **Typography/Metric** 18 uppercase (`END SESSION`), optional paired **delete** control (white, `1px rgba(212,87,42,0.2)`, **Radius/8**, trash **Semantic/Status/Error/Text`).

codeProps.primaryLabel: optional override of default uppercase label

notes: 2026-04-08: `FieldBookCtaButton` in `field-book-cta/` from Figma `1287:1563`; trash is inline SVG to match Edit Session sheet.
